example: turn off the lights: turn_off light.office_lights | turn on the lamp: turn_on light.office_lights | dim to 30%: turn_on light.office_lights brightness=30 | how many lamps?: I found 2 lamps in your home.
instruction_template: When the user wants to control a device, reply with ONLY a command line. Do NOT use JSON. Do NOT explain. Format: ACTION ENTITY [brightness=N]. Actions: turn_on, turn_off. Examples: {example}
followup_hint: The previous tool call already executed. Reply with one short sentence about what happened.
